description: Layer 2 (on-chain) payroll-only NFTs for PNW MVP v2. v2 deployment uses employer_agreement_v4 (the v1 deploy was stuck on employer_agreement_v2 and @noupgrade). Stores commitment-only artifacts (doc_hash/root/inputs_hash) for paystub/payroll summaries across cycle, quarterly, YTD, and EOY scopes. No raw payroll amounts or identities are published.
